rules: Positive reaction despite Risk classification: mechanism == Risk and car_value > 0
Negative reaction despite Strategic Importance classification: mechanism == Strategic_Importance and car_value < 0
Reaction stronger than historical average: abs(car_value) > abs(mechanism_mean_car)
Reaction weaker than historical average: abs(car_value) < abs(mechanism_mean_car)

insights.title: Positive abnormal CAR for a Risk event
insights.explanation: Pelosi Visit is classified as Risk, but the selected asset outperformed its benchmark during the event window.
insights.use_note: Rule-based educational insight. Not investment advice.

insights.title: Event reaction exceeds mechanism average magnitude
insights.explanation: Pelosi Visit had a larger abnormal-CAR magnitude than the current Risk mechanism average.
insights.use_note: Rule-based educational insight. Not investment advice.

insights.title: Event reaction exceeds mechanism average magnitude

insights.use_note: Rule-based educational insight. Not investment advice.

insights.category: Negative reaction despite Strategic Importance classification
insights.title: Negative abnormal CAR for a Strategic_Importance event
insights.explanation: NVIDIA Taiwan AI Factory is classified as Strategic_Importance, but the selected asset underperformed its benchmark during the event window.
insights.use_note: Rule-based educational insight. Not investment advice.
